name: Tex-Mex Quiche
recipeIngredient: 1 cup half & half or light cream
1 medium ripe tomato, cut into 8 wedges
1 small ripe avocado, peeled, seeded, and cut into 1/4 inch wedges
6 thin slices white onion, broken into rings
recipeInstructions: Prepare crust as directed in the recipe for Classic Quiche. Prepare Filling #1: In a small bowl using a wire whisk or fork, beat eggs and half & half until well blended. Sprinkle cheese over the bottom of the prebaked crust. Place the tart pan on the oven rack; carefully pour the egg mixture over the cheese. Filling #2: Layer ingredients in the prepared crust. Beat eggs with milk and seasonings. Pour over. Bake as directed for Classic Quiche. To Serve: Arrange tomato and avocado slices over the quiche before slicing. Makes 8 servings.
